data_description.api_key: The C2hat bot token (starts with `c2hat-bot-`). Generate from c2hat Preferences → Integrations → Bot tokens.
data_description.base_url: Override the c2hat server URL. Leave the default unless you self-host.
data_description.default_channel: The channel to post to if no channel is specified when sending a message.
data_description.icon: Emoji shortcode (e.g. :robot_face:) or URL used as the bot avatar.
data_description.username: Home Assistant will post to C2hat using the username specified.

user.description: Generate a bot token from c2hat Preferences → Integrations.
